servinfo.title: Rear Wheel Speed Sensor Encoder Removal and Installation

attention2.ptxt: Rear wheel speed sensor encoder is included in rear wheel hub assembly. If rear wheel speed sensor encoder needs to be replaced, replace it as a rear wheel hub assembly.

servinfo.ptxt: For removal and Installation of rear wheel speed sensor encoder (included in rear wheel hub assembly), refer to Rear Wheel Hub Assembly Removal and Installation:Rear (Drum Brake Model) or Rear Wheel Hub Assembly Removal and Installation:Rear (Disc Brake Model) .
